service_line_config.name: java
service_line_config.tech_context: This project is built with Java. Key considerations: - Framework: Spring Boot, Spring Framework (MVC, Security, Data, Cloud) - API: Spring Web MVC, Spring WebFlux for reactive, gRPC - ORM: Spring Data JPA (Hibernate), MyBatis, JDBC Template - Architecture: Layered architecture, hexagonal/ports-and-adapters, microservices - Authentication: Spring Security, OAuth 2.0, Keycloak, JWT - Messaging: Spring Kafka, Spring AMQP (RabbitMQ), JMS - Caching: Spring Cache (Redis, Caffeine, EhCache) - Testing: JUnit 5, Mockito, Spring Boot Test, Testcontainers, MockMvc - Build: Maven or Gradle, Docker, Jenkins/GitHub Actions CI/CD - Code quality: SonarQube, Checkstyle, SpotBugs, JaCoCo coverage - Hosting: Embedded Tomcat, Docker, Kubernetes, AWS ECS/EKS, Azure AKS

artifact_overrides.module_extraction: Map modules to Spring Boot services or Maven/Gradle modules. Each module should correspond to a bounded context, microservice, or library in the project structure.
artifact_overrides.functional_req: - Reference Spring components where applicable (Controllers, Services, Repositories) - For API requirements, specify REST conventions, DTOs, and validation annotations - For data requirements, reference JPA entities, relationships, and repository queries - For security requirements, specify Spring Security filter chain and method-level security
artifact_overrides.nonfunctional_req: - API throughput and latency benchmarks under concurrent load - JPA query performance and N+1 detection - JVM heap sizing and garbage collection tuning targets - Connection pool configuration (HikariCP) - Thread pool sizing for async and blocking operations - Health check, metrics, and distributed tracing requirements (Micrometer, Zipkin)
artifact_overrides.task: - Project scaffolding: Spring Boot starters, module structure, build configuration - Domain model: JPA entities, value objects, Flyway/Liquibase migrations - API development: controllers, DTOs, validation, exception handlers - Service layer: business logic, transaction management, event publishing - Security: Spring Security config, OAuth resource server, role/authority setup - Integration: RestTemplate/WebClient, Kafka producers/consumers, external APIs - Testing: unit tests, MockMvc integration tests, Testcontainers for DB tests - DevOps: Dockerfile, multi-stage build, CI pipeline, Kubernetes manifests
artifact_overrides.test_case: - Test API endpoints with MockMvc or WebTestClient - Test JPA repositories with @DataJpaTest and embedded database - Test service layer with Mockito-mocked dependencies - Test integration flows with Testcontainers (database, Kafka, Redis) - Test Spring Security with @WithMockUser and custom SecurityContext - Verify API contracts with Spring REST Docs or contract tests
artifact_overrides.architecture: - Module structure: multi-module Maven/Gradle project layout - API architecture: controller organization, DTO mapping, global exception handling - Data architecture: JPA entity design, repository pattern, migration strategy - Security architecture: Spring Security filter chain, OAuth flows, method security - Messaging architecture: Kafka topics, consumer groups, dead letter topics - Caching architecture: cache regions, eviction policies, cache-aside pattern - Deployment architecture: Docker images, Kubernetes deployments, config management
artifact_overrides.risk_entry: - Spring Boot version upgrade breaking changes in auto-configuration - JPA lazy loading issues and unexpected queries in production - JVM memory pressure under high concurrency - Dependency version conflicts in multi-module projects - Kafka consumer lag and message processing failures - Testcontainers CI/CD compatibility and execution time overhead
